findings.title: Overly permissive CORS configuration with origin reflection and credentials
findings.description: After-request handler reflects arbitrary Origin header into Access-Control-Allow-Origin while enabling credentials

findings.title: Debug mode enabled with weak secret key
findings.description: Flask DEBUG mode set to True and SECRET_KEY set to trivially guessable value 'changeme'

findings.title: XML External Entity processing enabled in product import
findings.description: lxml XMLParser created with resolve_entities=True and no_network=False enabling XXE attacks

findings.title: Verbose error handling exposes stack traces to clients
findings.description: Global exception handler returns full Python traceback and exception details in JSON response

findings.title: Unrestricted settings modification without authentication
findings.description: PUT /api/settings endpoint allows any unauthenticated user to modify security-critical application settings

findings.title: Diagnostics endpoint exposes environment variables and database credentials
findings.description: Admin diagnostics endpoint returns full database connection string, all environment variables, and Python path
